---
title: "Books"
subtitle: "The jstats book series — coming soon."
---

::: {.callout-note title="Coming soon"}
Full details, sample chapters, and where to buy will live here.
:::

Two books are planned:

- ***Statistics in R, Made Accessible*** — for readers meeting statistics and R at
  the same time. Warm and patient, assuming no prior knowledge of either, building
  carefully from the ground up.
- ***From SPSS and Stata to R*** — for researchers who already know the statistics
  and want a clear path into R with jstats: function options, design rationale, and
  migration patterns from commercial software.

The free [Get Started](index.qmd) guide and the [Guides](guides.qmd) section are a
reduced version of the books' material; the books are the deeper, complete
treatment.
